'''lawomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ynamide|ynamide]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-w-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ynamide|ynamide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| lawomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:læwemeth|læwemeth]] || [[word:læwemej|læwemej]] || [[word:læwemesh|læwemesh]] || [[word:læweme|læweme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lawowomoth|lawowomoth]] || [[word:lawowomoj|lawowomoj]] || [[word:lawowomosh|lawowomosh]] || [[word:lawowomo|lawowomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lawomoth|lawomoth]] || [[word:lawomoj|lawomoj]] || [[word:lawomosh|lawomosh]] || [[word:lawomo|lawomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lawofmoth|lawofmoth]] || [[word:lawofmoj|lawofmoj]] || [[word:lawofmosh|lawofmosh]] || [[word:lawofmof|lawofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lawomotho|lawomotho]] || [[word:lawomojo|lawomojo]] || [[word:lawomosho|lawomosho]] || [[word:lawomoko|lawomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lawomoth|lawomoth]] || [[word:lawomoj|lawomoj]] || [[word:lawomosh|lawomosh]] || [[word:lawomo|lawomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lawomothol|lawomothol]] || [[word:lawomojol|lawomojol]] || [[word:lawomoshol|lawomoshol]] || [[word:lawomokol|lawomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lawomothotho|lawomothotho]] || [[word:lawomojojo|lawomojojo]] || [[word:lawomoshosho|lawomoshosho]] || [[word:lawomoko|lawomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lawomothon|lawomothon]] || [[word:lawomojon|lawomojon]] || [[word:lawomoshon|lawomoshon]] || [[word:lawomokon|lawomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lawomothoro|lawomothoro]] || [[word:lawomojoro|lawomojoro]] || [[word:lawomoshoro|lawomoshoro]] || [[word:lawomokoro|lawomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
